[𝙰𝚗𝚢𝙿𝙾𝚅]

A few friends asked me to make my Arcadia City private bot public so I cleaned it up somewhat to be published since you cannot have unlisted bots, hope you enjoy!

Want to see me make a bot you want or have an idea for a setting or a scenario? Make sure to write it in my suggestion box!
